title: Research
text: I investigate whether renewable energy penetration shields US counties from higher energy prices stemming from exogenous oil price shocks, using the Russia-Ukraine War as a natural experiment.

title: Research
text: I investigate whether renewable energy penetration shields US counties from higher energy prices stemming from exogenous oil price shocks, using the Russia-Ukraine War as a natural experiment.

title: Eli Cheam Shapiro
text:
Eli Cheam Shapiro
    Incoming Analyst, Penn Wharton Budget Model
    MRes in Economics · Sciences Po Paris

    
      In June, I will be joining the
      Penn Wharton Budget Model
      at the University of Pennsylvania as an analyst. My research is on public finance, inequality, and political economy, with a special focus on the distributional impacts of fiscal policy and public investment.
    

    
      Previously, I was a predoctoral research assistant at Trinity College Dublin.
      I hold an MRes in Economics from Sciences Po Paris
      and a BA in Economics from Bard College.
    

    
      I am proficient in R, Python, STATA, and Julia.
    

    
      
         elicheamshapiro@gmail.com
      
      
         LinkedIn
